creator: anon_101100@yahoo.com
text:
heirloom-mailx-12.4_2 does not respect the unignore command:

? ignore
content-transfer-encoding
in-reply-to
message-id
mime-version
received
references
? unignore received
? ignore
content-transfer-encoding
in-reply-to
message-id
mime-version
received
references
?

How-To-Repeat: As above.
